title: vernonia marginata var. tenuifolia
intro: Vernonia marginata var. tenuifolia, also known as Tenuifolia, is a variety of the Vernonia marginata plant, a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Vernonia marginata var. tenuifolia include relief from fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments for skin issues like eczema and acne.
